PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Oliver Bray, via ZOOM, for John R. Stevens II, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that it is accepting Mr. Stevens' filed declaration as proof of the will under probate code 8221 and that the matter is being called to confirm whether anyone appears to object. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-17-2018 is admitted to probate. John R. Stevens, II is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority/limited authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-23-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.
